name: Sike there is a Femboy Ver.
description:
so this is like the, buuuut, artist finally release more art

apparantly he/she is name Blake, i say he/she cause the artist like genderswapping back and forth, so Ema can be the Girl variant, and Blake can be the boy variant, so here you go the male varaint of Ema as the artist intended

btw art is interchangeable for Ema and Blake, because the artist loves to genderswap using clothes with Blake/blakey/ema as the medium, confusing i know but ay, artist do what artist do, so this is similar to ema, just femboy version, still a bottom heavy shortstack dont worry~

[Artist: Archie / @Archiechuu]
